option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <LinearLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:paddingTop="35dp" android:orientation="vertical" android:gravity="center_horizontal" android:paddingLeft="35dp" android:paddingRight="35dp">
<FrameLayout android:layout_width="130dp" android:layout_height="130dp" android:layout_gravity="center" android:contentDescription="Profile Picture" android:elevation="8dp" android:padding="5dp" android:scaleType="centerCrop" app:shapeAppearanceOverlay="@style/ShapeAppearanceOverlay.App.CircularImage">
<com.google.android.material.progressindicator.CircularProgressIndicator android:id="@+id/circular_progress" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:indeterminate="true" app:indicatorColor="@color/primary" />
</com.google.android.material.imageview.ShapeableImageView>
<TextView android:id="@+id/profileNameTextView" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_gravity="center_horizontal" android:layout_marginBottom="15dp" android:layout_marginTop="10dp" android:textSize="40dp" android:textColor="@color/dark_text" android:textStyle="bold" />
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/editProfileButton" style="@style/Widget.Material3.Button.OutlinedButton" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Edit Profile" android:textColor="@color/primary" app:strokeColor="@color/primary" app:strokeWidth="3dp" android:paddingVertical="10dp" android:paddingHorizontal="30dp" android:textSize="20dp" android:textStyle="bold" app:cornerRadius="100dp" />
<!-- todo add user posts--> </LinearLayout>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <LinearLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:paddingTop="35dp" android:orientation="vertical" android:gravity="center_horizontal" android:paddingLeft="35dp" android:paddingRight="35dp">
<FrameLayout android:layout_width="130dp" android:layout_height="130dp" android:layout_gravity="center" android:contentDescription="Profile Picture" android:elevation="8dp" android:padding="5dp" android:scaleType="centerCrop" app:shapeAppearanceOverlay="@style/ShapeAppearanceOverlay.App.CircularImage">
<com.google.android.material.progressindicator.CircularProgressIndicator android:id="@+id/circular_progress" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:indeterminate="true" app:indicatorColor="@color/primary" />
</com.google.android.material.imageview.ShapeableImageView>
<TextView android:id="@+id/profileNameTextView" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_gravity="center_horizontal" android:layout_marginBottom="15dp" android:layout_marginTop="10dp" android:textSize="40dp" android:textColor="@color/dark_text" android:textStyle="bold" />
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/editProfileButton" style="@style/Widget.Material3.Button.OutlinedButton" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Edit Profile" android:textColor="@color/primary" app:strokeColor="@color/primary" app:strokeWidth="3dp" android:paddingVertical="10dp" android:paddingHorizontal="30dp" android:textSize="20dp" android:textStyle="bold" app:cornerRadius="100dp" />
<!-- todo add user posts--> </LinearLayout>
